body: {"ac_map":[{"parent_ac":"1. TestWorkerSupervisor_ExpiredBlockedTerminalDoesNotSuppressRestartForever covers a terminal newer than desired.UpdatedAt becoming restartable after DefaultTerminalBlockTTL.","coverage":"Child 1 AC 1 covers the terminal newer than desired.UpdatedAt becoming restartable after DefaultTerminalBlockTTL; Child 1 AC 2 covers the complementary pre-TTL blocked behavior."},{"parent_ac":"2. TestWorkerSupervisor_ActiveBlockedTerminalConsumesOneDesiredSlot proves one active block does not suppress all starts when DesiredCount \u003e 1.","coverage":"Child 2 AC 1 covers one active block not suppressing all starts when DesiredCount \u003e 1; Child 2 AC 2 covers the desired-slot cap when active blocks plus live/running workers satisfy DesiredCount."},{"parent_ac":"3. TestWorkerSupervisor_ExpiredBlockedTerminalFeedsRestartBackoff proves repeated expired operator_attention/dirty_root terminals are throttled by restartEvents/backoff.","coverage":"Child 3 AC 1 covers appending restartEvents evidence for an expired terminal block; Child 3 AC 2 covers repeated expired operator_attention/dirty_root terminals being throttled by restartEvents/backoff."},{"parent_ac":"4. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/... -run \"TestWorkerSupervisor_(ExpiredBlockedTerminalDoesNotSuppressRestartForever|ActiveBlockedTerminalConsumesOneDesiredSlot|ExpiredBlockedTerminalFeedsRestartBackoff)\"` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC 3 runs TestWorkerSupervisor_ExpiredBlockedTerminalDoesNotSuppressRestartForever; Child 2 AC 3 runs TestWorkerSupervisor_ActiveBlockedTerminalConsumesOneDesiredSlot; Child 3 AC 3 runs TestWorkerSupervisor_ExpiredBlockedTerminalFeedsRestartBackoff."},{"parent_ac":"5. `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/...` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC 4, Child 2 AC 4, and Child 3 AC 4 each require `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/server/...` to pass."},{"parent_ac":"6. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.","coverage":"Child 1 AC 5, Child 2 AC 5, and Child 3 AC 5 each require `lefthook run pre-commit` to pass."}],"child_ids":["ddx-480054d5","ddx-b0ad3954","ddx-40829ca5"],"rationale":"The parent bead has three separable behaviors: TTL expiry for stale terminal blocks, active-block desired-slot accounting, and restartEvents/backoff integration for expired-block restarts. Splitting along those behavior boundaries keeps each child executable against cli/internal/server/workers_supervisor.go with one named TestWorkerSupervisor_* focus while preserving the parent non-scope constraints, labels, parent reference, verification gates, and the absence of supplied dependency IDs or governing artifact references."}
